actionLibraryList.title: Dynamic Shoulder Circles
actionLibraryList.context: Lift your head, straighten your chest, and perform shoulder circles to the fullest range.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"context":"1.Touch your fingers to your shoulders and draw circles using your shoulders as the pivot point.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1749524137343.jpg"}]
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: This movement can enhance the mobility of your shoulder joint.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your body still and avoid swaying.

actionLibraryList.title: Half-Kneeling Modified Rainbow
actionLibraryList.context: Move at a steady pace; do not go too fast.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1751445217568.jpg","context":"1.Touch your knee to your elbow."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1751445221248.jpg","context":"1.Bend the knee at 90 degrees, keeping it aligned with the toes.\n2.Open the elbows out to the sides of the body."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Breathe out at a steady pace.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel a stretch in the chest and abdomen.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep the pelvis stable without rotation.

actionLibraryList.title: Standing Dual-Handle Chest Press
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Adjust the dual handles to chest height and maintain a staggered stance.
2.Position the handles roughly level with your chest, elbows bent at about 90°, palms facing down.
3.Lead with the chest to push the handles forward along a horizontal line, lightly squeezing the chest at the peak.
4.Slowly return to the starting position, keeping the elbows slightly bent and core engaged.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice1Txt: Set the pulley at chest height with two handles attached.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice4Txt: Gently lean forward to engage your core and stabilize your torso.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice5Txt: Keep breathing: exhale as you press forward, inhale as you return to the starting position.
actionLibraryList.guideVoice6Txt: Engage your pectoral muscles to press the handles forward, directly in line with your chest.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"context":"1.Bend your elbows to bring arms parallel to the ground.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1748922240653.jpg"},{"context":"1.Depress the shoulder straps and fully adduct the upper arms to horizontal.\n2.Keep the spine neutral and core engaged.\n3.Shift your weight slightly forward.","img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1748922245449.jpg"}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale during the exertion, inhale on the return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Maintain constant tension in the chest.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Lean your body slightly forward to stabilize your torso.

actionLibraryList.title: Kneeling Bent-Over Overhead Curl
actionLibraryList.context: Keep your upper arms parallel to the floor.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1748315448728.jpg","context":"1.Kneel on the floor, leaning forward with your elbows on the bench.\n2.Avoid arching your back or letting your lower back sag."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1748315452491.jpg","context":"1.Keep your upper arms close to the bench."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale as you exert force, inhale as you return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your arms close to the bench.

actionLibraryList.title: Seated Barbell Good Morning
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Sit on a bench with your feet flat on the floor, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
2.Place the barbell on your upper traps, holding it firmly with both hands.
3.Hinge at the hips to lean your torso forward to a safe maximum angle.
4.Keep your back straight, avoiding lower back collapse.
5.Return to the starting position by driving your torso up with your glutes.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1766463070586.png","context":"1.Place the barbell on your upper traps, avoiding pressure on the neck.\n2.Keep your back straight and chest lifted."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1766463073492.png","context":"1.Hinge at the hips to lean forward, keeping your back straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Inhale as you hinge forward, exhale as you return.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Focus on feeling the activation in your glutes and hamstrings.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your core engaged to prevent your lower back from sagging.

actionLibraryList.title: Bent-Over Dual-Handle underhand Triceps kickback
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Bend forward, hold the handles with an underhand grip, elbows bent.
2.Keep the upper arms close to the body and parallel to the floor, core engaged.
3.Press the handles back under control, extending the elbows until the arms are nearly straight.
4.Pause briefly at the top, feeling the triceps contract.
5.Slowly bend the elbows to return, maintaining control throughout.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1748423031802.jpg","context":"1.Bend forward, hold the handles with an underhand grip, elbows bent.\n2.Keep the upper arms close to the body and parallel to the floor, core engaged."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1748423040834.jpg","context":"1.Press the handles back under control, extending the elbows until the arms are nearly straight."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale during the push, inhale during the return.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your upper arm stable throughout the movement, avoiding body sway or using momentum.

actionLibraryList.title: ​Half-Kneeling Single-Arm Preacher Curl​
actionLibraryList.context: Kneel on one knee, with the other leg bent at 90°, stabilizing your body and resting your elbow on the knee. Slowly bend your elbow, pulling the weight towards your shoulder. Pause briefly at the top and feel the contraction in your biceps.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750405576837.jpg","context":"1.Kneel on one knee, with the other leg bent at 90°, and rest your elbow on the knee."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1750405580789.jpg","context":"1.Bend your elbows and pull the weight towards your shoulder."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale while pulling, inhale while returning.
actionLibraryList.motionFeeling: Feel the contraction in your biceps.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your upper arm close to the inner thigh.

actionLibraryList.title: Diamond Push-Up
actionLibraryList.context:
1.Place your hands on the ground in a diamond shape (thumbs and index fingers touching) under your chest.
2.Extend your legs, toes on the ground, body in a straight line, core engaged.
3.Inhale to bend elbows and lower your chest toward the center of your hands; exhale to extend elbows and push back up.
actionLibraryList.showDetails: [{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1749800789917.jpg","context":"1.Place your hands under your chest, thumbs and index fingers touching to form a diamond.\n2.Keep your body in a straight line, core engaged."},{"img":"https://d1rwzqjevxdih5.cloudfront.net/1749800793778.jpg","context":"1.Keep your elbows close to your sides."}]
actionLibraryList.breathingRate: Exhale while pressing up, inhale while lowering down.
actionLibraryList.errorCorrection: Keep your core engaged, maintain a straight body, and avoid sagging or shrugging.

actionLibraryList.title: ​Half-Kneeling Single-Arm Preacher Curl​
actionLibraryList.context: Kneel on one knee, with the other leg bent at 90°, stabilizing your body and resting your elbow on the knee. Slowly bend your elbow, pulling the weight towards your shoulder. Pause briefly at the top and feel the contraction in your biceps.

actionLibraryList.title: Diamond Push-Up
actionLibraryList.context:

2.Extend your legs, toes on the ground, body in a straight line, core engaged.
3.Inhale to bend elbows and lower your chest toward the center of your hands; exhale to extend elbows and push back up.
